name: DOGE Value Reacceptance Exhaustion v1
thesis: In choppy DOGE 4h conditions, exhaustion moves can reverse only after price reaccepts prior value. The edge should come from broad reclaim-after-stretch behavior rather than raw oversold or overbought touches.
edge_mechanism: exhaustion mean reversion after value reacceptance
invalidation_condition: Abort if this remains too sparse, shows zero trades on valid data, or cannot maintain post-cost edge in blind windows.

long: Take profit: EMA_20 + 1.3 * ATR_14 or 1.6 * ATR_14, whichever comes first
short: Take profit: EMA_20 - 1.3 * ATR_14 or 1.6 * ATR_14, whichever comes first
